<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! A few things that will save
round-trips on review:

- For non-trivial changes, please file an issue first
  (see CONTRIBUTING.md). Small fixes can land directly.
- Run `npm run check` and `npm test` before pushing.
  CI runs both on PRs.
- Keep the commit title under 80 characters and in the
  imperative ("Fix X", "Add Y").
- By submitting this PR you agree to license your
  changes under GPL-3.0-or-later.
-->

## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences. Skip "this PR adds"; start
with the verb: "Adds a", "Fixes the", "Refactors". -->

## Why

<!-- Link the issue if there is one (`Closes #123`).
Otherwise: the user-facing problem, the failure mode,
or the design rationale. -->

## How I verified

<!-- e.g. "Ran npm test (89 cases pass), confirmed
the Verified chip still appears on the nordic-wear
fixture, screenshot below." -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything subtle, anything you considered and
rejected, anything the diff doesn't make obvious. -->
